validate.notes: Environment broken: every Bash tool call fails with 'EACCES: permission denied, mkdir /home/worker/.claude/session-env' before any command executes. Cannot run docker build, NOP test, gold test, or rubric judge. Read/Edit tools work, but no shell access means no validation possible. Prior validate node (kimi-k2p5-turbo) reported pass with nop=0/gold=1/icr=1.0; that result is preserved in history but cannot be re-verified here.
